title: psychotria capuronii
intro: Psychotria capuronii, also known as the Madagascar wild coffee or coffee tree, is a plant species native to the island of Madagascar. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Psychotria capuronii include reducing fever, treating gastrointestinal issues, and providing relief from pain and inflammation. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or decoction, and is also sometimes used as a coffee substitute due to its caffeine-like properties.
